cards.jyutping: haau6 hing3 jap6 min6 mou5 hung2 lung4 wun6 geoi6 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: Candy，你可以教我哋點樣做隻老虎嗎？
cards.jyutping: nei5 ho2 ji5 gaau3 ngo5 dei6 dim2 joeng2 zou6 zek3 lou5 fu2 maa1

cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 lou5 fu2 hong6 dak1 fei1 soeng4 fei1 soeng4 zi1 maan6 gaa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 tiu3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.jyutping: lou5 fu2 hou2 zung1 ji3 tim2 gon1 zeng6 zi6 gei2 ge3 san1 tai2
cards.english: Tigers really like to lick their bodies clean.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 更重要嘅係當佢哋開心嗰陣，佢哋就會瞓
cards.jyutping: gang3 zung6 jiu3 ge3 hai6 dong1 keoi5 dei6 hoi1 sam1 go2 zan6 keoi5 dei6 zau6 wui6 fan3

cards.jyutping: gam3 do1 wai6 hou2 maa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)

cards.jyutping: waa1 tai2 haa6 nei5 dei6 bin3 saai3 zou6 lou5 fu2 aa3
cards.english: Wow, look, you've all turned into tigers!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)
cards.characters: 我喺度教緊佢哋點樣扮一隻老虎啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai2 dou6 gaau3 gan2 keoi5 dei6 dim2 joeng2 baan6 jat1 zek3 lou5 fu2 aa3

cards.jyutping: hung2 lung4

cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 soeng2 jiu3 di1 hei3 kau4 aa3 m4 goi1

cards.characters: 我可以要個大笨象氣球嗎？

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E20 The School Fete［校慶］(Canto spoken subs)
